title: <div>  •  Week 8 aligns with the narrative “climax” in the Hero’s Journey struct
content:
• Week 8 aligns with the narrative “climax” in the Hero’s Journey structure.
• This is where power dynamics shift, factions evolve, and the stakes get higher.
• This is where literary themes of war, revolution, or collapse are most likely to occur.

📜 Chaos Event Structure:
✔ Players will have three event options:
1. The Black Plague – A devastating, random XP/curse spread with no faction control.
2. The Great War – Players must form alliances or betray each other in open conflict.
3. The Trial – Few chosen players will face judgment, and the verdict affects everyone.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Aligns with narrative structure—major upheaval comes at the midpoint of a story.
✔ Creates a huge class-wide moment that everyone engages with.
✔ Balances randomness and strategy.

📜 3. Reroll Mechanics & How They Work
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 435 (chunk 435/555)
